implementation_notes: GraphQL query is hard-coded with $login, $from, $to parameters; 1-year window ending now (UTC).
Per-repo /languages calls are sequential and capped at MAX_LANGUAGE_FETCHES = 30 (inline-deviation dev-001).

MissingTokenError class is exported but not currently thrown internally — caller (ui-shell main.js) may opt to throw it before calling fetchProfilePayload. The contract documents both error classes; this builder chose alt-a degraded behavior over alt-b explicit MissingTokenError throw for the pinned/contribution sections, matching FC.6 alt-a.
No retry/backoff; rate-limit error message instructs user to retry.
test_strategy: Static checks via source-grep + module structure inspection (run by edge-case-testing). Live MCA.api-client.2/3/4 deferred to first-contact CV verification on a real browser execution path.
